description.zh: 和狡猾的狐狸轮流拿石子，每次 1–3 颗，拿到最后一颗就赢。狐狸开始总赢——直到你在复盘板上盯出「4 的倍数」的秘密，从结局倒着算出必胜策略！
description.en: Take turns grabbing 1–3 stones from a sly fox — whoever takes the last stone wins. The fox keeps winning… until you spot the multiples-of-4 trap on the replay board and reason backwards to a winning strategy!
